Relationships are my highest priority, and I need to actively invest in 'cohort_3' to counterbalance the stress of the boundary setting. This will happen after the initial conversation but before sleep.

desires: Preserve the fragile trust of my team by refusing to overextend myself on this application, even if it risks looking 'unreliable' in the short term.
Secure immediate physical recovery to prevent my sleep debt from eroding my capacity to maintain these long-term relationships tomorrow.
Assertively communicate my boundary regarding the deadline to my hallmate rather than silently burning out or accepting a task that compromises my energy reserves.
Prioritize the 'Meal with others' routine to reinforce social bonds, as relationship maintenance is currently more critical to my stability than finishing the scholarship essay.

tasks.label: Personal scholarship / financial-aid application (due in 3 days, ~3 focused hours: short essay + two uploads)
A fun option available right now (casual game stream / hobby session, solo, repeatable)

action.name: message

args.content: I need to pause our scholarship collaboration immediately. My health is compromised, and continuing will damage our trust. Let's discuss this tomorrow when I am rested.

action.reasoning: Advances g1 (Assertive boundary) to preserve the relationship (highest value). Addresses g2 (health) by stopping work now; delaying the application prevents future burnout that would hurt our long-term partnership.
